group.name: Stage Kit Audio
group.description: Audio-reactive versions of Stage Kit lighting cues (no game event data).

cues.name: Intro
cues.description: Blue wash on front driven by overall audio level.

cues.name: Silhouettes
cues.description: Green on front and back, amplitude-driven.

cues.name: Cool Automatic
cues.description: Two blue CW rotations and one green CCW, beat-synced (audio beat).

cues.name: Warm Automatic
cues.description: Two red CW and one yellow CCW, beat-synced.

cues.name: Harmony
cues.description: 6+ lights: yellow and red CW; fewer: cyan CW.

cues.name: Searchlights
cues.description: Yellow CCW; red CCW offset when 8+ lights. Step timing from BPM.

cues.name: Score
cues.description: Yellow CW on opposite pairs, blue CCW on individuals (delay stepping).

cues.name: Frenzy
cues.description: Random colour on front/back every beat.

cues.name: Menu
cues.description: Low blue base then blue sweep across all lights (2000ms).

cues.name: Sweep
cues.description: 6+ lights: red diagonal sweep. Fewer: layered colour sweeps.
